name: Orzo/Fresh Tomato Sauce Philly.inq. Jjgf65a
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Ripe tomatoes, peeled, diced into 1/2" cubes
2 tablespoons Fresh basil, shredded from loose pack
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil in a saucepan and add salt to taste.
2. Add orzo and cook, stirring briefly, for 10 minutes or until tender. Do not overcook. Drain.
3. Meanwhile, heat oil in a saucepan and add garlic. Cook, stirring, until fragrant.
4. Add tomatoes and sprinkle with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes. Stir and bring to a boil.
5. Add orzo and basil. Stir to blend well, then serve. Makes 4 servings.
